meta.title: Rhythmic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Argentina | Zaltyko - CGG
meta.description: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, levels 1-10, 5 apparatus and CGG licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over CGG athletes, official categories, levels 1-10, 5 apparatus and licenses. Argentine Championship and provincial selectivos.

painPoints.generic: Managing federations, licenses and apparatus equipment on paper is chaos. Little time for training due to excess paperwork.
painPoints.specific: Renewing CGG licenses, managing gymnastic equipment (ropes, hoops, balls, clubs, ribbons), tracking technical levels 1-10 and required exercises.
